response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetically matches the provided JSON lyrics for the song performance in Scene 2. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics reference for the musical segment; manual transcription and translation were required for the intro (Scene 1) and the extended discussion (Scene 3) where the guest Hizuki Yui is introduced. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed vocal bursts precisely to the audio. Applied aggressive end-time truncation and instantaneous transitions during the fast-paced song sections. Included prominent on-screen song metadata at the beginning of the performance.

subtitles.original: いきますよー
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original:
ダイダイダイダイダイキライ
作詞・作曲: Amala
subtitles.english:
[Song: Dai Dai Dai Dai Dai Kirai]
[Lyrics/Composition: Amala]

subtitles.original: 全部 全部 アンタのせいだ
subtitles.english: It's all, all your fault.

subtitles.original: 反吐が出るくらいにウザったいわ
subtitles.english: You're such a pain, it makes me wanna hurl.

subtitles.original: 何かに縋って諂って
subtitles.english: Clinging to things, fawning over things...

subtitles.original: 期待したアタシが馬鹿だった
subtitles.english: I was stupid to think I'd get something out of it.

subtitles.original: ご機嫌伺いの八方美人
subtitles.english: I'm a people-pleaser coming to pay my respects,

subtitles.original: それ故にアンチな一生Gimme
subtitles.english: So gimme an hater life.

subtitles.original: 浅いキャパシティ まいどおおきに
subtitles.english: I've got a shallow capacity, thanks for your patronage.

subtitles.original: つまるとこ 人生ずっと地味
subtitles.english: Basically, my life's always been drab.

subtitles.original: ｢憎たらしい！｣｢痛々しい！｣
subtitles.english: "How hateful! How pathetic!"

subtitles.original: 無視出来ないのが一層
subtitles.english: The way I can't ignore you makes it worse-

subtitles.original: 腹立たしい 苛立たしい
subtitles.english: How maddening, how vexing.

subtitles.original: そろそろ飽きた 自画自賛に (Look around!!)
subtitles.english: I've had just about enough of blowing my own horn. (Look around!!)

subtitles.original: ライクの反対はアパシー ≒ 繋がれた証
subtitles.english: The opposite of like is apathy ≈ proof that you're connected.

subtitles.original: 切り離せない関係 逸らしてしまいたいわ
subtitles.english: A relationship I can't cut off... I'd love to just look away from it.

subtitles.original: これは所謂 ヘイトスピーチ
subtitles.english: This is what you'd call hate speech.

subtitles.original: 匿名性の声明を生命に載せてんだ
subtitles.english: We're slapping these anonymous declarations onto our very lives.

subtitles.original: 鳴り止まないサイレン 近づく度に痙攣
subtitles.english: We spasm every time those ceaseless sirens draw near.

subtitles.original: 赤信号にずっと従順です。
subtitles.english: We've obeyed red lights all this time.

subtitles.original: 大体 アナタのコト アタシ ダイダイダイダイダイキライ
subtitles.english: Point is, 'bout you, I absolutely--hate hate hate hate hate you.

subtitles.original: OMG 情けない 最早 バイバイバイバイバイしたい
subtitles.english: OMG, how pathetic, I just wanna say--bye bye bye bye bye already.

subtitles.original: 脳内も予測不能 故に 解解解解解は無い
subtitles.english: Can't predict what's going on in that mind, and thus there's--no no no no no solution.

subtitles.original: どうだい？アタシのコト アナタ ダイダイダイダイダイキライになった？
subtitles.english: How's it? 'Bout me, do you absolutely--hate hate hate hate me now?

subtitles.original: あァ 百害あって一利ナシ Nothing Not see
subtitles.english: Ah, all pain and no gain, nothing, not see.

subtitles.original: もしタラレバ並べてもニコチンだし
subtitles.english: It'd be like nicotine to think back on the what-ifs.

subtitles.original: I miss youって近付いた結末は凡ミス 凡ミス
subtitles.english: Getting close because "I miss you," was a stupid mistake, mistake.

subtitles.original: センキュー 反面教師 後味 一生消えてくんないわ
subtitles.english: Thanks for being a great bad example. You've left an aftertaste that won't ever disappear.

subtitles.original: よしよし いい子ね 笑顔振り撒き パラパラ いい子ね
subtitles.english: Good, good, you're a good girl, smiling and spreading yourself around, good girl,

subtitles.original: だけど だけど その本性は？
subtitles.english: but, but what's your true nature?

subtitles.original: 善悪の区別も付かないの？笑 はぁ。
subtitles.english: Can't you even tell right from wrong? LOL, sigh.

subtitles.original: 減点方式で取り巻く環境に巻かれて
subtitles.english: Winding myself up in an environment based on a point-deduction system,

subtitles.original: 生涯、痛い！痛い！痛い！も聞かれないわ！って
subtitles.english: My "It hurts! It hurts! It hurts!" won't be heard for a lifetime,

subtitles.original: 当然の報いにクラっちゃった
subtitles.english: I got hit by the inevitable retribution.

subtitles.original: 人は鏡なんです
subtitles.english: People are mirrors.

subtitles.original: 実のところ 依存は両辺です
subtitles.english: In truth, dependency is on both sides.

subtitles.original: シャットダウンしても付き纏う 己の弱さが不甲斐ない
subtitles.english: Even if I shut down, I'm haunted by my own pathetic weakness.

subtitles.original: 全部 全部 アンタのせいって 反吐が出るくらいに 止まんないわ
subtitles.english: It's all, all your fault, I can't stop feeling... like I'm gonna hurl.

subtitles.original: いっその事 切り離せた方が楽なのにな
subtitles.english: It'd be so much easier if I could just cut it off.

subtitles.original: 大体 アナタのコト アタシ ダイダイダイダイダイキライ
subtitles.english: Point is, 'bout you, I absolutely--hate hate hate hate hate you.

subtitles.original: OMG 情けない 最早 バイバイバイバイバイしたい
subtitles.english: OMG, how pathetic, I just wanna say--bye bye bye bye bye already.

subtitles.original: 脳内も予測不能 故に 解解解解解は無い
subtitles.english: Can't predict what's going on in that mind, and thus there's--no no no no no solution.

subtitles.original: どうだい？アタシのコト アナタ ダイダイダイダイダイキライになった？
subtitles.english: How's it? 'Bout me, do you absolutely--hate hate hate hate me now?

subtitles.original: あァ 百害あって一利ナシ Nothing Not see
subtitles.english: Ah, all pain and no gain, nothing, not see.

subtitles.original: もしタラレバ並べてもニコチンだし
subtitles.english: It'd be like nicotine to think back on the what-ifs.

subtitles.original: I miss youって近付いた結末は凡ミス 凡ミス
subtitles.english: Getting close because "I miss you," was a stupid mistake, mistake.

subtitles.original: センキュー 反面教師 後味 一生消えてくんないわ
subtitles.english: Thanks for being a great bad example. You've left an aftertaste that won't ever disappear.

subtitles.original: イェーイ！ありがとうございましたー！
subtitles.english: Yeah! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: というわけでゲスト、はい、ユイちゃんです！
subtitles.english: And so, our guest is... yes, it's Yui-chan!

subtitles.original: はい、改めましてネオポルテ所属の緋月ゆいです。そらさん、お誕生日おめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: Hi, once again, I'm Hizuki Yui from Neo-Porte. Sora-san, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！来てくれて嬉しい！
subtitles.english: Thank you! I'm so happy you came!

subtitles.original: おめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: Congratulations!

subtitles.original: 一年ぶり！
subtitles.english: It's been a year!

subtitles.original: 一年ぶり！
subtitles.english: A year!

subtitles.original: いやね、去年はね、ちょっと残念ながらメッセージだけということだったんですけど...
subtitles.english: Well, last year, unfortunately, it was just a message...

subtitles.original: あ、どうも... あの、去年は本当に申し訳ございませんでした...
subtitles.english: Oh, right... Um, I'm really sorry about last year...

subtitles.original: いやメッセージでもね、すごくみんな「わー！」ってなってて、すごい嬉しかったですよ。
subtitles.english: No, even with the message, everyone was like "Wow!", so I was really happy.

subtitles.original: すごいガラガラ声でね、去年は...
subtitles.english: With such a raspy voice last year...

subtitles.original: お茶目になっちゃったね。
subtitles.english: You were being playful.

subtitles.original: 参加させていただいたんですけれども、今年はリベンジができてとっても嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I participated, but I'm so happy I could have my revenge this year!

subtitles.original: やったー！リベンジだー！
subtitles.english: Yay! It's revenge!

subtitles.original: 呼んでいただいて嬉しいです。ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: I'm happy to be invited. Thank you!

subtitles.original: こちらこそ！今回の曲もね、私が選んだんですけど...
subtitles.english: Likewise! I chose this song as well...

subtitles.original: やっぱりあの、ゆいちゃんといえばカッコいい声っていうのがね、すごく私の中で、もう頭の中にあった、やっぱカッコいいよ！
subtitles.english: But you know, when I think of Yui-chan, I think of that cool voice, it was just in my head, it's so cool!

subtitles.original: えー、本当ですか？
subtitles.english: Really?

subtitles.original: なので、このデュエットっていうのもあるので、この曲をぜひ一緒に歌いたいと思ってオファーしました。
subtitles.english: So, since it's a duet, I really wanted to sing this song together and made the offer.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: どうだったかな？
subtitles.english: How was it?

subtitles.original: いや、あの、歌も超難しかったんですけど、どちらかというとダンスが普段あんまりしないので...
subtitles.english: Well, the song was super hard, but more than that, I don't usually dance much...

subtitles.original: そうだよね！
subtitles.english: That's true!

subtitles.original: はい、そらそらとダンスレッスンなどもやらせていただきましてですね...
subtitles.english: Yes, I got to do dance lessons and such with Sora-sora...

subtitles.original: したのしたの！
subtitles.english: We did, we did!

subtitles.original: この本番に向けて準備してまいりました。
subtitles.english: And I prepared for this performance.

subtitles.original: ね！でも振り覚えめちゃくちゃ早くてびっくりした！
subtitles.english: Right! But I was surprised by how fast you learned the moves!

subtitles.original: いえいえ、恐縮でございます。ちょっとね「あーっ」って言いながら回ってたの。
subtitles.english: No, no, I'm flattered. I was turning around while going "Ahhh".

subtitles.original: そうなの！
subtitles.english: Is that so!

subtitles.original: 間奏でターンするところがあったんですけど、皆さん、ターンが本当に体幹がなさすぎて「あーっ」
subtitles.english: There was a part where we turn during the interlude, and everyone, my core was so weak that I stumbled...

subtitles.original: 「あーっ」って何回もよろけてですね、大変だったんですけど...
subtitles.english: ...going "Ahhh" "Ahhh" and stumbled many times, it was hard...

subtitles.original: いや、でも本番は完璧だったんじゃないの？
subtitles.english: But wasn't it perfect during the real thing?

subtitles.original: あ、よかったです。
subtitles.english: Oh, that's good.

subtitles.original: いや素晴らしいよ！
subtitles.english: No, it was wonderful!

subtitles.original: よかったー。よろけなくて。めっちゃ頭で「よろけんじゃねー、よろけんじゃねー」と思いながら...
subtitles.english: Thank goodness. I didn't stumble. In my head I was thinking "Don't stumble, don't stumble"...

subtitles.original: めっちゃよろけないようにっていうことを考えながら...
subtitles.english: Thinking so hard about not stumbling...

subtitles.original: 意識しちゃうよね！
subtitles.english: You do become conscious of it!

subtitles.original: 意識してました。そらさんが完璧なんで、ダンスが...
subtitles.english: I was conscious. Because Sora-san is perfect at dancing...

subtitles.original: いやいや、そんなことない！
subtitles.english: No, no, not at all!

subtitles.original: いやいや、全然そんなことないから！隣立つから、私もよろけないようにしないとって思って。
subtitles.english: No, no, not at all! Since I'm standing next to you, I thought I had to make sure I don't stumble.
